author: y4rr
content: Decision: rebuild swin.rs from scratch (~1500 lines, Phase 10 inception pattern). Match torchvision swin_t named_parameters EXACTLY: features.0.{0,2}, features.{1,3,5,7}.{i}.{norm1,attn,norm2,mlp.{0,3}}, features.{2,4,6}.{norm,reduction}, norm, head. Fused QKV (no split). relative_position_index as Vec<i64> non-Module field (NOT Parameter, NOT named_parameter). Cyclic shift via ferrotorch_core::ops::tensor_ops::roll (eval-mode only — see issue). All structural ops via permute().contiguous().view(). Last stage shift_size=0 enforcement: window_size=7 == 7 (final spatial), shift_size>=H triggers force-zero (per torchvision's runtime guard). With H=W=7 stage-3 spatial, the runtime guard naturally produces shift_size=0. Pad path needed since 56/28 are divisible by 7 but mid-stage spatial (after 2 downsamples to 14, 7) all are divisible — so pad=0 always for swin_t input 224×224.
